title: Pataki Enters Republican Field
framed_question: What position is former New York Gov. George Pataki seeking in the 2016 election?
answer: Former New York Gov. George Pataki is seeking the Republican presidential nomination in the 2016 election. He is joining the contest to become the Republican candidate for President.

title: Pataki Enters Republican Field
framed_question: Following a notable and well-regarded development, what position is former New York Gov. George Pataki seeking in the 2016 election?
answer: The article does not mention a notable and well-regarded development, but it does state that former New York Gov. George Pataki is joining the 2016 Republican presidential contest. He is seeking the position of President in the 2016 election.

title: Romney Defends Remarks
framed_question: What comments did Mitt Romney make about President Obama's base supporters at a fundraiser earlier this year?
answer: Mitt Romney commented that President Obama's base supporters are "reliant on government," don't pay taxes, and "believe they are victims." He made these comments at a fundraiser earlier this year, which were captured in a video.
